name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_tsrc_uvw_incident_report
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_tsrc' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_incident_report' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`CreatedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`OccurrenceDateTime` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`DetectedDateTime` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`InitialResponse` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`EndDateTime` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ArriveOnSiteTime` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`CreatedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`OccurrenceDateTime` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`DetectedDateTime` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`InitialResponse` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`EndDateTime` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ArriveOnSiteTime` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'CreatedDate|OccurrenceDateTime|DetectedDateTime|InitialResponse|EndDateTime|ArriveOnSiteTime' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_tsrc`.`uvw_incident_report`
